page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.32xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance provides 128 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, resulting in 128 vCPUs. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this instance.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.g9a.32xlarge offers a highly consolidated environment for workloads requiring massive parallel processing and balanced memory allocation. The absence of local storage and GPU accelerators represents a design tradeoff that optimizes the instance for compute-heavy and memory-balanced tasks rather than local-disk-intensive or graphics-accelerated operations. Suitable workloads include large-scale web serving, enterprise application hosting, distributed databases, and containerized microservices.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.32xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at 2.7 GHz, it delivers 128 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, providing 128 vCPUs with dedicated CPU allocation. The instance features 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It contains no local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. With zero bundled GPUs and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this instance is designed for high-density, non-accelerated workloads. The balanced resource profile makes it highly suitable for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, distributed databases, and containerized environments requiring consistent, non-hyperthreaded CPU performance.
